caption: In a studio setting, a man with a beard wears a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt. He is positioned behind a black microphone and is speaking while gesturing with his right hand. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs, and a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands nearby, adjacent to racks of clothing and a black chair. Two logos are visible on screen: one in the lower left containing the text "BOOGIE" and another in the lower right that reads "BOOGIE FELIX TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man continues to talk and shift his expression. His right hand moves from pointing upward to pointing forward and then moves closer to his face. The text "YOU NEVER" and "SHIT" is partially visible on his t-shirt in the final frame.
